title: Calendar sync
excerpt: Is it possible to sync my “My Work” calendar with Outlook, instead of several?

posts.author: Pierce007 (Rune Haarberg)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to sync my “My Work” calendar with Outlook, instead of several?

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rune!

My Work just collects data from all of your tasks. You can integrate Outlook with the baords that you have individually. See this article to know more: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/4404712396562-Outlook-Calendar-Integration

Shanine, Mindflows
